message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

interface CommandInt {
  +Execute(): void
}

class Commands {
  - shape : string
  + Commands(shape:string)
  + Undo(): void
  + Redo(): void
  + PrintSVG(): void
  + CreateSVG(): void
  - «override» ToString(): string
}

class AddCMD {
  - shape : string
  + AddCMD(shape:String, history:List<String>)
  + Execute(): void
}

class UndoCMD {
  - history:List<String>
  - redoList:List<String>
  + UndoCMD(history:List<String>, redoList:List<String>)
  + Execute(): void
}

class RedoCMD {
  - history:List<String>
  - redoList:List<String>
  + RedoCMD(history:List<String>, redoList:List<String>)
  + Execute(): void
}

class PrintSVGCMD {
  - history:List<String>
  + PrintSVGCMD(history:List<String>)
  + Execute(): void
}

class CreateSVGCMD {
  - history:List<String>
  + CreateSVGCMD(history:List<String>)
  + Execute(): void
}

class List {
  - history:List<String>
  - redoList:List<String>
}

Commands --|> CommandInt
AddCMD --|> CommandInt
UndoCMD --|> CommandInt
RedoCMD --|> CommandInt
PrintSVGCMD --|> CommandInt
CreateSVGCMD --|> CommandInt

Commands --> AddCMD
Commands --> UndoCMD
Commands --> RedoCMD
Commands --> PrintSVGCMD
Commands --> CreateSVGCMD

AddCMD --> List : history<String>
UndoCMD --> List : history<String>
UndoCMD --> List : redoList<String>
RedoCMD --> List : history<String>
RedoCMD --> List : redoList<String>
PrintSVGCMD --> List : history<String>
CreateSVGCMD --> List : history<String>

@enduml
